Health is the greatest wealth.
Prevention is better than cure.
Take care of your body; it is the only place you have to live.
Small daily exercise prevents big hospital bills.
A healthy outside starts from the inside.
Your body hears everything your mind says. Stay positive!
Health is not just about what you're eating. It's also about what you're thinking.
Take care of your body. It's the only place you have to live.
The greatest wealth is health.
Health is a state of complete harmony of the body, mind and spirit.
A fit body, a calm mind, a house full of love. These things cannot be bought.
Physical fitness is the first requisite of happiness.
Good health and good sense are two of life's greatest blessings.
Health is like money, we never have a true idea of its value until we lose it.
